contactClosing.title: Want help comparing options?
contactClosing.body: Reach out for a personalized walkthrough—whether you already used the direct links or want Isaac to review alternatives.

enrollmentSteps.title: How enrollment works
enrollmentSteps.subtitle: Three simple steps. Timing and requirements vary by state and product.
enrollmentSteps.step1Body: Use the Manhattan Life button to launch the authorized enrollment experience for the product you chose.
enrollmentSteps.step2Body: Read plan materials carefully, then complete the application when you are ready.
enrollmentSteps.step3Body: Save documents and follow Manhattan Life’s instructions for payment and effective date.

metadata.title: Manhattan Life | Products & enrollment | Isaac Plans
metadata.description: Explore Manhattan Life products—short-term medical, indemnity, dental, and more. Start secure direct enrollment or get personalized help from Isaac Plans.
metadata.keywords: Manhattan Life, supplemental insurance, short term medical, Isaac Plans

hero.title: Manhattan Life products—quote the plan that fits
hero.lead: Browse supplemental, indemnity, and short-term strategies filed by Manhattan Life. Each card opens your authorized direct enrollment link; short-term medical has its own guided page.

stm.title: Short-term medical (STLDI)
stm.body: Bridge coverage between major medical plans with Manhattan Life’s STM experience—state- and form-dependent.

productsSection.title: All direct enrollment products
productsSection.subtitle: Choose a product to read more, or jump straight to enrollment.

disclaimer.title: Important
disclaimer.body: Products, availability, underwriting, and benefits vary by state and plan. This hub links to Manhattan Life’s authorized quoting site (direct.manhattanlife.com). You leave IsaacPlans.com; carrier terms and licensing apply. Isaac Plans Insurance may be compensated when you enroll through applicable programs.

metadata.title: All Manhattan Life plans | Manhattan Life | Isaac Plans
metadata.description: Learn about All Manhattan Life plans through Manhattan Life. Open the secure direct link; availability and benefits vary by state.
metadata.keywords: Manhattan Life, direct enrollment, Isaac Plans

hero.title: All Manhattan Life plans
hero.lead: Start from the full product catalog on Manhattan Life’s direct enrollment site. Availability, underwriting, and benefits vary by state—confirm details in the official flow.

what.title: What it is
what.body: This Manhattan Life product is accessed through the carrier’s authorized direct enrollment site. Benefits, underwriting, and availability depend on your state and plan—read all official materials before you apply.

who.title: Who it may fit
who.body: Individuals exploring supplemental or specified-benefit coverage who want a licensed carrier path with transparent online enrollment.

confirm.title: What to confirm in the quote
confirm.body: Premiums, benefit schedules, exclusions, waiting periods, and any coordination rules shown for your ZIP code.

more.title: More to know
more.body: Manhattan Life companies may issue policies under different legal entities by product and state. Marketing names can differ—your policy documents control.

items.q: Is this the same as ACA major medical?
items.a: Not necessarily. These products are often supplemental or limited-benefit designs. Read how your plan is classified in the official quote.

items.q: Where do I enroll?
items.a: Use the secure Manhattan Life direct link on this page to open the authorized enrollment experience.

items.q: Is every product available in my state?
items.a: No. Availability varies by state and product. The enrollment path will reflect what you can apply for.

items.q: Can Isaac Plans help me compare?
items.a: Yes—reach out if you want a second opinion before you enroll.
